global.description: The ad features a prominent product display with a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a product with a limited stock offer and free shipping.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: Three rectangular shapes resembling product containers, arranged horizontally in the center.

elements.label: Decorative circles
elements.description: Three small circles below the product display, adding a decorative touch.

elements.label: Additional decorative circles
elements.description: Two more small circles, slightly larger, positioned below the first set.

elements.label: Limited stock message
elements.description: Text that reads 'Limited stock' in a bold, clear font, centered below the product display.

elements.label: Shipping offer
elements.description: Text stating 'Free shipping over $25' in a smaller font, positioned below the limited stock message.

elements.label: Price text
elements.description: Text displaying the price '€9.99' in a prominent font, located at the bottom center.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Try for free' in a contrasting color, positioned below the price text.

elements.label: Brand name
elements.description: The brand name 'CrispBox' displayed prominently at the top in a bold font.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, simple and modern, CrispBox, limited stock, free shipping
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the product display is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: CrispBox, Limited stock, Free shipping over $25, €9.99, Try for free
